mnemonics: AMPS: Algorithm, Memory, Parallelism, Scalability - the four pillars of performance improvement.
keyPoints: Focus on reducing communication overhead between parallel processes.
Choose the right parallel algorithm and data decomposition strategy for the problem.
Optimize for load balancing to ensure all processors are utilized efficiently.
commonMistakes: Over-parallelizing, where the overhead of coordination exceeds the performance gain (Amdahl's Law).
Ignoring data locality, leading to excessive and costly memory access.
